headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On IDEX with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $214
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Daniel DiCicco   initiates coverage on IDEX (NYSE:IEX) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $214.
